summary: DHS video set to music with the tweet text 'Rejoice America, Christ is born!'. It is a montage of winter landscapes: snow-covered mountain forests, a single bison in falling snow, a waterfall in a frozen gorge, a frozen lake under an orange and purple sunset, and aerial shots of snowy peaks. A white serif title 'AMERICA' appears.

script.scene: Aerial shot of a snow-covered pine forest with a misty snow-capped mountain behind; large white serif title 'AMERICA' centered.
A single bison standing in a windswept snowy plain during falling snow.
A tall waterfall pouring into a snow-rimmed gorge with sun breaking through mist.
A frozen lake with cracked ice in the foreground and snowy mountains under an orange and purple sunset sky.
Aerial shot over jagged snow-covered mountain ridges with a volcanic peak on the horizon.
